title: Harris Trade Short Pile Micropoly Roller Sleeve 9"
features: For a great finish on smooth surfaces with interior paints
Enhanced micropoly fabric gives optimum paint absorption for fast, even coverage
For use with a 9" cage frame with a 1¾" core
Durable sleeve that is easy to clean for re-use (clean in accordance with paint manufacturer's instructions and stand on end to dry)
description: From the manufacturer Harris Trade 9" Short Pile Micropoly Roller Sleeve A 9” Short pile micropoly roller sleeve with a 1.75” core designed for a great finish on smooth surfaces such as recently plastered walls, plasterboard, or lining paper. Durable sleeve that is easy to clean for re-use (clean in accordance with paint manufacturer's instructions and stand on end to dry) As with all new sleeves, dampen the hand first & stroke sleeve to remove any excess, loose lint for the best finish For use with a 9" cage frame with a 1¾" core Fabric is heat fused to the core to prevent unwinding, even when soaked in water or solvent Engineered for the trade For a great finish on smooth surfaces with interior paints Enhanced micropoly fabric gives optimum paint absorption for fast, even coverage Minimal spatter 1¾" Core for maximum paint pick-up
